name: Rosemary Scones
recipeInstructions:
1. In a bowl, mix the flour, sugar, salt, and baking powder.
2. Add cold butter to the dry mixture and cut with your fingers or a pastry cutter until the mixture resembles coarse crumbs.
3. Stir in the eggs, egg yolk, and cream until well combined.
4. Fold in chopped fresh rosemary.
5. Mix in raisins or currants.
6. Transfer the dough to a lightly greased baking sheet using an ice cream scoop.
7. Brush the tops of the scones with egg wash.
8. Sprinkle with sugar.
9. Bake at 350°F (175°C) for 10-15 minutes, until golden brown.
User Note: For best results, use cold butter and keep everything as cold as possible to prevent spongy texture.
